title: EDEN wire — reassign request
description: Request body for POST /v0/experiments/{E}/tasks/{T}/reassign (07-wire-protocol.md §2.7). Admin-group-gated; the server stamps `reassigned_by` from the authenticated principal.

new_target.description: The new value of `task.target`: null opens the task to any registered worker; an object scopes it to a worker or group.

reason.description: Audit string carried into the task.reassigned event payload (typical: 'operator', 'failed_worker', 'misrouted').
